name: focustrack
description: Sends high-level coding telemetry to the FocusTrack desktop app (local-only, no cloud).

focustrack.enabled.description: Enable the FocusTrack extension. When disabled, no telemetry is sent.

focustrack.receiverPort.description: Port number of the FocusTrack app's local receiver. Must match the port configured in the FocusTrack app.

focustrack.token.description: Local extension token from the FocusTrack app (Settings → VS Code Integration → Security). Leave blank if token auth is not required.
